chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-1030 of 2023 _____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. _____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on Misc. No.4878/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.4879/2023 3. For order on Misc. No.4880/2023 4. For hearing of main case. 21.02.2023 Mr. Raheel Samsam Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner along with Muneeb Ahmed Dhamrah, Advocate. --------------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J.- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution claiming additional / grace marks in respect of the Medical and Dental College Admission Test-2022, where he obtained 153 marks. His case is that certain questions that were set were incorrect, hence additional / grace marks ought to be granted in this respect, which would bring his tally to 160. Having considered the matter, we see no force in the Petition, for even if the argument of Petitioner is taken as being correct for the sake of argument, the question paper was admittedly one and the same for all candidates and it cannot be said that the Petitioner was individually disadvantaged. Furthermore, the Petitioner has slept over the matter, as the Petition has been filed on 17.02.2023, when the admissions process has already been completed. As such while granting the application for urgency, we accordingly dismiss the Petition in limine along with other listed applications. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE TariqAli/PA
